{"code":"
# Step 1: Get unresolved Sentry issues
issues = sentry.list_issues(status="unresolved")

# Step 2: Find the one with the highest event count
top_issue = max(issues, key=lambda i: i["count"])

# Step 3: Send the email
email.send_email(
    to="oncall@acme.io",
    subject="Top error",
    body=f"The top unresolved Sentry issue is: {top_issue['title']}"
)
